violations.text: Yogurt and butter were observed held at 52-66 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into other refrigeration during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
Tabletop cooler in breakfast area was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
Opening observed near handsink in kitchen. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2025
The floors in the back kitchen preparation area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The ceiling in the back kitchen preparation area is constructed of painted sheetrock, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of pink and orange residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machines were taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machines must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
The floors in the back kitchen preparation area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

The ceiling in the back kitchen preparation area is constructed of painted sheetrock, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
